name: Arcana Soft
description: Arcana Soft est une Startup technologique innovante basée en Tunisie, spécialisée dans les solutions de gestion pour l'industrie. Nous avons développé Arckium GMAO, une solution de maintenance  orientée vers l'industrie 4.0. Cette plateforme intègre l'IoT, l'intelligence artificielle et le cloud pour optimiser la gestion des actifs, anticiper les pannes et réduire les coûts de maintenance en temps réel.

# Arcana Soft
Start-up
[www.arcana-soft.com](https://www.arcana-soft.com)Tunis, Tunisia
1 profile visit
AboutRepresentativesOpportunities
## About
**Arcana Soft** is a dynamic startup specializing in **Arckium** , a powerful **Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS)** designed to optimize maintenance operations for businesses of all sizes. **Arckium** offers an intuitive, cloud-based platform that allows companies to manage their assets, schedule maintenance tasks, track work orders, and monitor performance in real-time.
Our solution helps businesses reduce downtime, improve asset lifespan, and increase operational efficiency through automated workflows and data-driven insights. With **Arckium** , companies can streamline preventive maintenance, ensure compliance, and enhance decision-making with real-time analytics.
Built with scalability in mind, **Arckium** is ideal for industries ranging from manufacturing and facilities management to transportation and healthcare. Arcana Soft’s commitment to continuous innovation ensures that **Arckium** evolves with your business needs, helping you stay ahead in an ever-changing environment.
